author: Pokémon 公式
text:
Pikachu Goes Deep-Sea Diving! 🥽 | Pokémon: Master Quest | Official Clip
Pikachu is ready for a deep-sea dive! 🥽

Ash and friends help a Pokémon researcher explore a shipwreck so she can restore her great-grandfather’s legacy.

For more iconic Pokémon animation clips, check out our playlist here: https://pkmn.news/3OMJQZn

text:
🏆 Pokémon Champions is coming to mobile platforms June 17!
🏆 Take the Battle Arena with you when Pokémon Champions comes to iOS and Android on June 17!✨
